title: @you/review
description: Look up the packaged @you/review factory: canonical name, a one-sentence description, concrete named-run examples, short operational notes, and a link to the complete parent definition.

overview.title: Overview
overview.body: @you/review executes a work request and then independently reviews it before return so only approved outcomes leave the factory.

invocationExamples.title: Invocation examples
invocationExamples.body: Invoke the packaged factory by canonical name with you run --named, using positional or stdin input.

operationalNotes.title: Operational notes
operationalNotes.body: Execute runs first, then an independent reviewer checks the result. Rejection returns work to init for another execute pass. Successful review ends in the terminal approved outcome.

completeDefinition.title: Complete definition
completeDefinition.body: The parent Packaged Factory Reference keeps the complete definition source and published metadata for this package.

deterministicReplay.title: Deterministic replay
deterministicReplay.body: Inspect a full-mode deterministic work-graph replay for the packaged review recording: timeline scrubber, topology, and work progress.

links.completeDefinition: Complete @you/review definition on Packaged Factory Reference
